baseActionList.description: Navigate to a URL in the current tab.
Click an element on the page.
Hover or rollover an element on the page (use for dropdown menus or tooltips).
Type text into an input or text area.
Wait for an element to appear before continuing.
Get data from the bot's current page (use when users ask to extract/scrape/return data).
Download multiple files from a webpage (use for “download all PDFs/files”).
Upload a file from the user’s computer to a file input field (use when the user says upload files from my computer/device).
Read rows from a Google Sheet to use as input data (use for “from a Google Sheet” / “for each row”).
Write/append results to a Google Sheet (use for “save to a Google Sheet”).
Capture a screenshot of the current page.
Run a JavaScript step in the browser context.
Use a specific Axiom widget by machine_name.

widgetActionList.name: Integrate AI
widgetActionList.description: Interact with LLMs to extract data, generate text or make decisions. Supports either ChatGPT and Claude, requires an API key.

widgetActionList.name: Jump to another step
widgetActionList.description: Jump to a different step.

params.name: Jump to step
description: Enter the number of the step to jump to if the value is found.

params.name: Maximum cycles
description: Maximum number of times this step should trigger in a single run.

widgetActionList.name: Loop through data
widgetActionList.description: Finish and trigger the bot's run!

widgetActionList.name: Loop through data
widgetActionList.description: Repeat the sub-steps once for each item in a data set.

description: Repeat for each item in another step's data.
params.name: Loop through data
Show tooltips
description: Enter the time, in seconds, to show tooltips. Enter 0 for no tooltip.

widgetActionList.name: Catch
widgetActionList.description: Catch

widgetActionList.name: Extract data with ChatGPT
widgetActionList.description: Extract and structure data from any unformatted text.

params.name: Override default API key
description: Enter an Open AI key here to be used only on this step.
Enter data to extract values from
params.name: Data
Extract values
description: Enter a comma-separated list of items you want to extract from the given data, or select a template.

params.name: Select model
description: Choose the model you want to use.

widgetActionList.name: Generate text with ChatGPT
widgetActionList.description: Use ChatGPT to generate a passage of text, given any prompt.

params.name: Override default API key
description: Enter an Open AI key here to be used only on this step.

params.name: Prompt
description: Enter a prompt for ChatGPT to respond to.

params.name: Select model
description: Choose the model you want to use.

widgetActionList.name: Clear data from a Google Sheet
widgetActionList.originalName: Clear data from a Google Sheet
widgetActionList.description: Clear the contents of the selected cell range while preserving formatting.

params.name: Spreadsheet
description: Select Google sheet

params.name: Sheet name
description: Leave blank to use the first sheet.

params.name: First cell
description: Will use A1 if no value provided

params.name: Last cell
description: Will use ZZ if no value provided

widgetActionList.name: Click social media buttons
widgetActionList.description: Click on a social button such as like, follow, etc. but only if it has not already been clicked

params.name: Select
description: Choose what you want to click on.

params.name: Set value to check
description: The bot will check these values. If one is present on the link or button it will not perform the click.
params.value: Unlike, Following, Liked, true, UPVOTED, Following
params.default_value: Unlike, Following, Liked, true, UPVOTED, Following

widgetActionList.name: Write javascript
widgetActionList.description: Are you a coder? Write some custom javascript to do any kind of operation you can think of.

params.name: Script
description: You can return values as an array of arrays from this step, for use in other steps.

widgetActionList.name: Continue only if a condition is met
widgetActionList.originalName: Continue only if a condition is met
widgetActionList.description: Check that data contains certain values; when it does, continue execution. Otherwise, stop.

description: Enter data to check for a value.
params.name: Data to check
Condition to check
description: Check data for either a list of words or if a javascript expression is true.

params.name: Fail if condition not met
description: Tick this box to end the run with the 'Failed' status if the condition is not met. If this is left unchecked, the run will end in 'Success' instead.

params.name: Reverse condition
description: Continue if the condition is NOT met.

widgetActionList.name: Count rows
widgetActionList.description: Count the number of rows in the selected data.

description: Select the data to count.
params.name: Data

widgetActionList.name: Create formatted Google Sheet
widgetActionList.description: Create formatted Google Sheet

widgetActionList.name: Create a new Google Sheet
widgetActionList.description: Create a new Google Sheet

params.name: Sheet name
description: Enter a name for the new Google Sheet.

widgetActionList.name: Date and time
widgetActionList.description: Store a relative date and time as data or reformat existing date and time data that can be used later.

widgetActionList.name: Current Url
widgetActionList.description: Grab the current URL at the time that the automation starts running, and store it as data.

params.name: Get current url
description: When Axiom starts running, the page you have it open on will be stored in this step's output data.

widgetActionList.name: Date picker
widgetActionList.description: Interact with a date picker to select a particular date

params.name: Select month
description: Select the text of the month on the datepicker

params.name: Select month change button
description: Select either the previous or next month button, depending on whether you want to look into the future (next) or past (previous)

params.name: Change month to
description: Type the text of the month you want to change to. NOTE: this must be exactly as it appears on the datepicker for it to work!

params.name: Change day of month to
description: Type the day of the month you'd like to switch to.

widgetActionList.name: Delete rows from a Google Sheet
widgetActionList.originalName: Delete rows from a Google Sheet
widgetActionList.description: Delete rows from a Google Sheet

params.name: Spreadsheet URL
description: Select Google sheet

params.name: Sheet name
description: Optionally specify a sheet name to delete from. Sheets are different tabs visible at the bottom of your google doc; enter the name that appears on the tab to specify the sheet. Leaving this blank will use the first sheet in the document.

params.name: First row to delete
description: Enter the number of the first row to delete

params.name: Last row to delete
description: Enter the number of the last row to delete. Everything between the first and last rows will also be deleted.

widgetActionList.name: Display a message
widgetActionList.description: Show a message to the user's browser window. Can contain any text or data from previous steps - useful for checking if things are working!

params.name: Message
description: Enter some text to display! You can also plug data into this field from other steps.

widgetActionList.name: Go back to the previous page
widgetActionList.originalName: Go back to the previous page
widgetActionList.description: Go back to the previous page

params.name: Go back
description: Return to the previous page, like clicking the 'Back' button in the browser.

widgetActionList.name: Clear cookies
widgetActionList.description: Clear all cookies in the current bot browser session.

widgetActionList.name: Click element
widgetActionList.description: Instruct the bot to click on a button, link, or any other clickable thing.

params.name: Select
description: Select an element. Use dedicated download steps for downloading files.

params.name: Optional click
description: If checked & the selected element is not present on the page the automation will continue without an error.

params.name: Double click
description: If checked a double click on the selected element will be performed. This setting will be ignored if performing a right click.

params.name: Left click | Right click
description: Toggle off to perform a left click; toggle on to perform a right click.

widgetActionList.name: Click multiple elements
widgetActionList.description: Instruct the bot to click multiple buttons, links or other clickable things that share a common structure.

params.name: Select
description: Select elements. Use dedicated download steps for downloading files.

params.name: Left click | Right click
description: Toggle off to perform a left click; toggle on to perform a right click.

params.name: Maximum clicks
description: The maximum number of clicks to perform.

widgetActionList.name: Get clipboard contents
widgetActionList.description: Get the contents of the clipboard to use in subsequent steps.

widgetActionList.name: Close browser tab
widgetActionList.description: Close a tab in the running automation.

params.name: Select Tab
description: Enter the tab to close. 1 chooses the tab on the farthest left, 2 the second left etc.

widgetActionList.name: Write javascript
widgetActionList.description: Utilise JavaScript, custom code, or Axiom APIs when the user explicitly asks for scripting.

params.name: Script
description: Return values as an array of arrays from this step.

params.name: Run in app
description: Check to run the javascript in the context of the Axiom app, rather than in the browser window.

widgetActionList.name: Get current bot URL
widgetActionList.description: Grab the URL that bot is currently on and store it as data for later use.

widgetActionList.name: Download file
widgetActionList.description: Download a single file from a webpage.

params.name: Select
description: Choose the file to download

params.name: Folder
description: Set a folder to download into (please note currently only one new folder can be created at a time)

params.name: File name
description: Enter a name to save the file as. File name will be appended with a number e.g. "example" would become "example1.jpg", "example2.jpg" and so on unless the overwrite existing file option is used.

params.name: Overwrite existing file
description: Tick here to overwrite any existing file with the same name instead of renaming the newly downloaded file.

params.name: Force download
description: Some files will open in the browser window instead of download. Tick here to force a download instead.
This field does nothing when the file does not open in the browser window.

params.name: Download start wait time
description: Increase the length of time axiom will wait for a download to start.

widgetActionList.name: Download files
widgetActionList.description: Download multiple files from a webpage.

params.name: Select
description: Choose the files to download

params.name: Folder
description: Set a folder to download into (please note currently only one new folder can be created at a time)

params.name: File Name
description: Enter a name to save the files as. File name will be appended with a number e.g. "example" would become "example1.jpg", "example2.jpg" and so on

params.name: Force download
description: Some files will open in the browser window instead of download. Tick here to force a download instead.
This field does nothing when the file does not open in the browser window.

params.name: Download start wait time
description: Increase the length of time axiom will wait for a download to start.

widgetActionList.name: Download file from URL
widgetActionList.description: Download a file from the given URL to your computer.

params.name: Enter URL
description: Enter the URL of a file to download. You can also plugin data from other steps.

params.name: Folder
description: Set a folder to download into (please note currently only one new folder can be created at a time)

params.name: File Name
description: Enter a name to save the file as. File name will be appended with a number e.g. "example" would become "example1.jpg", "example2.jpg" and so on unless the overwrite existing file option is used.

params.name: Overwrite existing file
description: Tick here to overwrite any existing file with the same name instead of renaming the newly downloaded file.

params.name: Force download
description: Some files will open in the browser window instead of download. Tick here to force a download instead.
This field does nothing when the file does not open in the browser window.

widgetActionList.name: Download a file to Google Drive
widgetActionList.originalName: Download a file to Google Drive
widgetActionList.description: Download a single file from a webpage to a Google Drive folder. Maximum file size that can be processed is 250MB.

params.name: Select
description: Choose the file to download

params.name: Google Drive folder URL
description: Enter the URL of the folder in Google Drive to download to.

params.name: File name
description: Enter a name for the file on Google Drive. Leave blank to keep the existing filename.

params.name: Force download
description: Some files will open in the browser window instead of download. Tick here to force a download instead.
This field does nothing when the file does not open in the browser window.

params.name: Auto convert
description: Automatically convert the downloaded file to a Google Docs editor format. ZIP files or images will not be converted.

params.name: Local folder
description: If you are using the desktop version of Axiom you can set a local folder here to use as an intermediate step for the file download. Do not use this setting if you are running Axiom via the cloud.

params.name: Download start wait time
description: Increase the length of time axiom will wait for a download to start.

widgetActionList.name: Enter text
widgetActionList.description: Instruct the bot to enter some text into a field.

params.name: Select text field
description: Choose the text field that the bot should enter text into. If you do not select a field, the bot will type into whatever is selected by default.

params.name: Text
description: Sending DMs in apps like Instagram? Configure a custom line break below - click to learn why

params.name: Delay
description: Delay between each key press in miliseconds.

params.name: Append to existing
description: Toggle on to skip clearing the text before entering. The value will be appended to whatever is already in the box.

params.name: Custom line break
description: Record a sequence of characters to use instead of enter for line breaks. For example, record shift and enter for Instagram DMs.

params.name: Optional text
description: If checked & the selected field is not present on the page the automation will continue without an error.

widgetActionList.name: Export to CSV
widgetActionList.description: Export data to a CSV file

description: Select the data to convert into a CSV file.
params.name: DATA
Folder
description: Set a folder to export the file to

params.name: File name
description: Enter a name to export the file as. Duplicate file names will be appended with a number e.g. "example.csv" would become "example1.csv", "example2.csv" and so on unless the overwrite existing file option is used.

params.name: Overwrite existing file
description: Tick here to overwrite any existing file with the same name instead of renaming the newly exported file.

widgetActionList.name: Upload a file
widgetActionList.description: Use this step when the user asks to upload files from their computer/device. Targets a standard file input (e.g. input[type="file"]) and provides a local file path.

params.name: File Input Field
description: Choose the form element to upload the file to. Note that this is only guaranteed to work on standard HTML file upload fields - some customised file upload implementations may not function. Sorry!

params.name: File Path
description: Input the path to the file on your computer that should be uploaded.

widgetActionList.name: Go to page
widgetActionList.description: Instruct the bot to go to a new page.

params.name: Enter URL
description: Enter a URL to go to. You can also plugin data from other steps to provide a URL. Enter (skip) to skip this step.

params.name: Store Cookie
description: Cookie detected, store if running in the cloud and you wish to run your automation using the scheduler or the API.

params.name: Do not share localstorage
description: Check the box to stop Axiom retrieving session data from this URL's localstorage. This will prevent an extra page refresh but can prevent your session from loading fully.

params.name: Open in new tab
description: Check the box to open the URL in a new browser tab, the automation will automatically switch to running in the new tab.

widgetActionList.name: Press key(s)
widgetActionList.description: Record a key press for the bot to execute. Multiple keys can be pressed at once.

params.name: Key
description: Click record, then press the keys you want the bot to press. You can record a sequence of keys.
The bot will enter these one by one, except for Ctrl, Alt, or Shift, which will be held down until the end of the sequence.
The contents of the data will be entered as key presses (optional). This overwrites any recorded sequence.
params.name: Data
Delimiter
description: When using data, use this character to seperate individual key presses. Make sure this is present between each desired key press in the given data, or this step will not work properly.

params.name: Delay
description: Set a delay between each key press (in milliseconds).

widgetActionList.name: Mouse click & drag
widgetActionList.description: Instruct the bot to move the mouse to the start coordinates then click and drag to the end coordinates

params.name: Start coordinates
description: Coordinates of the location for the initial mouse click. You should disable any ad blockers or other browser extensions which may change the page layout before recording the coordinates, as extensions are not loaded when the automation is run.

params.name: End coordinates
description: Coordinates of the location to drag the mouse to. If left blank the same coordinates will be used as for the start click location to perform a single click without dragging

widgetActionList.name: Log In
widgetActionList.description: Tell the bot to log into a site by entering the page and username. The bot will hand over to you to enter a password.

params.name: Username field
description: Choose the field that the username should be entered into.

widgetActionList.name: Save page HTML
widgetActionList.description: Download the HTML of the current page to your computer.

params.name: Folder
description: Set a folder to save to (please note currently only one new folder can be created at a time)

params.name: File name
description: Enter a name to save the HTML page as. If a file with this name already exists it will be appended with a number e.g. "page" would become "page1.html", "page2.html" and so on unless the overwrite existing file option is used.

params.name: Overwrite existing file
description: Tick here to overwrite any existing file with the same name instead of renaming the newly downloaded file.

widgetActionList.name: Save screenshot locally
widgetActionList.description: Save a screenshot of a webpage or part of a webpage to your local machine

params.name: Selected element
description: Select an element to screenshot that area on the page.

params.name: Folder
description: Set a folder to save to (please note currently only one new folder can be created at a time)

params.name: File name
description: Enter a name to save the screenshot as. If a file with this name already exists it will be appended with a number e.g. "screenshot" would become "screenshot1.jpeg", "screenshot2.jpeg" and so on unless the overwrite existing file option is used.

params.name: Overwrite existing file
description: Tick here to overwrite any existing file with the same name instead of renaming the newly downloaded file.

params.name: File type
description: File type to save the screenshot as

widgetActionList.name: Save screenshot to Google Drive
widgetActionList.description: Save a screenshot of a webpage or part of a webpage to a Google Drive folder.

params.name: Selected element
description: Select an element to screenshot that area on the page.

params.name: Google Drive folder URL
description: Enter the URL of the folder in Google Drive to save the screenshot to.

params.name: File name
description: Enter a name to save the screenshot as. Leave blank to use the default Google Drive filename.

params.name: File type
description: File type to save the screenshot as

params.name: Local folder
description: If you are using the desktop version of Axiom you can set a local folder here to use as an intermediate step for the file save. Do not use this setting if you are running Axiom via the cloud.

widgetActionList.name: Get a list of links to pages from bot's current page
widgetActionList.originalName: Get a list of links to pages from bot's current page
widgetActionList.description: Scrape links from the page the bot is currently on. Use the scraped links to visit those pages and perform further actions.

params.name: Select
description: Choose the links you wish to scrape.

params.name: Find pager
description: Select the 'Next' button for the pager, if there is one. When running the bot, please select 'Use element text' if it stops paging after the first page.

params.name: Max results
description: Set a maximum number of results you wish to scrape. Setting this number higher than the number of results you need will slow down the scraper - axiom has to spend time looking for results that it will never find.

widgetActionList.name: Scrape metadata
widgetActionList.description: Scrape metadata from a page

params.name: Metadata
description: Select the metadata to scrape from the page.

widgetActionList.name: Select list
widgetActionList.description: Instruct the bot to choose a value from a select list or dropdown form field.

params.name: Select
description: Choose the select list.

params.name: Text
description: Input the option the bot should select, or use data.

widgetActionList.name: Get data from bot's current page
widgetActionList.originalName: Get data from bot's current page
widgetActionList.description: Scrape data from the page the bot is currently on.

params.name: Select
description: Choose the data you wish to scrape.

params.name: Find pager
description: Select the 'Next' button for the pager, if there is one. When running the bot, please select 'Use element text' if it stops paging after the first page.

params.name: Max results
description: Set a maximum number of results you wish to scrape. Setting this number higher than the number of results you need will slow down the scraper - axiom has to spend time looking for results that it will never find.

widgetActionList.name: Solve Captcha
widgetActionList.description: Use the 2Captcha external service to solve a captcha.

params.name: 2Captcha
description: Additional charges may be incurred, a 2Captcha account is required.

help.name: To learn more about this step, see our

params.name: Override default API key
description: Enter a 2Captcha API key here to be used only on this widget.

widgetActionList.name: Switch browser tab
widgetActionList.description: Instruct the bot to switch to a different browser tab (that is already open).

params.name: Select Tab
description: Set the position of the tab to switch to. 1 chooses the tab on the farthest left, 2 the second left etc.

widgetActionList.name: Upload a file from Google Drive
widgetActionList.originalName: Upload a file from Google Drive
widgetActionList.description: Instruct the bot to upload a file from Google Drive to a file field.

params.name: File Input Field
description: Choose the form element to upload the file to. Note that this is only guaranteed to work on standard HTML file upload fields - some customised file upload implementations may not function. Sorry!

params.name: Google Drive file URL
description: Enter the URL of the file in Google Drive to upload.

params.name: Local folder
description: If you are using the desktop version of Axiom you can set a local folder here to use as an intermediate step for the file download. Do not use this setting if you are running Axiom via the cloud.

widgetActionList.name: Wait
widgetActionList.description: Instruct the bot to wait for the given number of milliseconds. Wait for loading events, animations, page rendering etc.

widgetActionList.name: Else
widgetActionList.description: Perform these steps only when the previous if condition failed

widgetActionList.name: End Loop
widgetActionList.description: Break out of a loop and proceed to the next step

widgetActionList.name: End Run
widgetActionList.description: End the run when this step is reached

widgetActionList.name: Add error metadata
widgetActionList.description: The output from this step will be added to any error messages that occur in any step after this one - useful for debugging your automation.

params.name: Message
description: Build your custom error message here, you can select tokens to display the values they contain at runtime.

widgetActionList.name: Export to CSV
widgetActionList.description: Export data to a CSV file. It will be downloaded to your Chrome downloads folder when the automation runs. Please note that the CSV will not download if triggered from an external service or API.

description: Select the data to convert into a CSV file.
params.name: Export to CSV
File name
description: Enter a name to save the file as. If the file already exists it will be renamed by the browser download process.

widgetActionList.name: Append or merge data
widgetActionList.description: Merge two pieces of data together by appending one to the other. You can append either horizontally, which merges rows, or vertically, which adds all the columns in the second set to the end of the first.

description: Data to be appended to
params.name: Data A

description: Data to append
params.name: Data B
Append mode
description: Whether to append the data horizontally or vertically

params.name: Horizontal append start column
description: Specify a column to begin a horizontal append at.
For example, entering '5' or 'E' here will append beginning at the 5th column even if the first dataset has less than 5 columns. Will be ignored for vertical append mode.

widgetActionList.name: Enter custom data
widgetActionList.description: Create custom data to use later in your automation.

params.name: Custom data
description: Enter a list of items to store as data; each line will be stored as a new row.

widgetActionList.name: Join different data sources based on matching columns
widgetActionList.originalName: Join different data sources based on matching columns
widgetActionList.description: Join data gathered from different sources together. A shared column is used to combine the two. For example, use this to join product info from different e-commerce sites.

description: Enter the base data to join with another.
params.name: Base data
Base data column
description: Column of data to use as the basis of the join. For example, if you want to join based on company name, enter the column number or letter which contains the company name here.
Enter the data you want to join with the base data.
params.name: Join data
Column
description: Specify a particular column of the base data to always match against. Leave this blank to match with any column.

params.name: Fuzzyness of the match
description: Ranges from 0 to 1. 0 indicates that the match must be exact, and 1 indicates that anything will match. It's recommended to start with a low value here.

widgetActionList.name: Remove duplicates
widgetActionList.description: Remove duplicates from the specified data. This can be limited to particular columns.

description: The data to deduplicate
params.name: Data
Columns to check
description: Specify a list of column numbers, each separated with a comma. Only these columns will be checked for duplicates.
For example, entering 'A,B' here will check for duplicates in columns A and B only.

widgetActionList.name: Remove results that contain certain words
widgetActionList.originalName: Remove results that contain certain words
widgetActionList.description: Filter out rows from your data that contain particular words.

description: Select the data you wish to remove rows from.
params.name: Data
Words (comma separated)
description: Enter either a list of any number of words to check for, separated by commas, or data containing a list of words, one in each row.
Any row that contains the given word will be removed.

params.name: Match on word boundary
description: Check this to match only when the complete word appears in the data. Only the characters a-z A-Z 0-9 and _ are considered to be part of a word, all other characters are considered as being part of a word boundary.

params.name: Columns (optional)
description: Specify a list of column numbers, each separated with a comma. Only rows that have matches within these columns will be removed.
For example, entering '1,2' here will check in columns 1 and 2 only.

widgetActionList.name: Replace text
widgetActionList.description: Replace one piece of text with another within a dataset.

description: Select the data within which you want to replace text.
params.name: Data to replace words
Text to replace
description: Enter the text you want to replace

params.name: Replace with
description: Enter what you want to replace the text with

widgetActionList.name: Split a name into columns
widgetActionList.description: Takes any full name and splits it into its parts - title, first name, last name and additional names.

description: Select data to expand.
params.name: DATA
Column
description: Enter the column in the data where the names can be found. You can enter either a number (starting from 1) or a capital letter (starting from A).
Please ensure you only enter one value as only the first column provided will be used.

params.name: Fields
description: Select the fields to split the name into. The order of the parts will be the same as below.

widgetActionList.name: Remove HTML code
widgetActionList.description: Strip all the HTML from a set of data.

description: Select the data to remove HTML from.
params.name: DATA

widgetActionList.name: Swap rows and columns
widgetActionList.description: Swap (transpose) the rows and columns in your data. Rows become columns and columns become rows.

description: Select the data to transpose.
params.name: Transposable data

widgetActionList.name: Remove results which do not contain certain words
widgetActionList.originalName: Remove results which do not contain certain words
widgetActionList.description: Filter out rows from your data that do not contain particular words.

description: Select the data you wish to remove rows from.
params.name: Data
Words (comma separated)
description: Enter either a list of any number of words to check for, separated by commas, or data containing a list of words, one in each row.
Any row that does not contain the given word will be removed.

params.name: Match on word boundary
description: Check this to match only when the complete word appears in the data. Only the characters a-z A-Z 0-9 and _ are considered to be part of a word, all other characters are considered as being part of a word boundary.

params.name: Columns (optional)
description: Specify a list of column numbers, each separated with a comma. Only rows that have matches within these columns will be removed.
For example, entering '1,2' here will check in columns 1 and 2 only.

widgetActionList.name: Find row in a Google Sheet
widgetActionList.originalName: Find row in a Google Sheet
widgetActionList.description: Search for values in a Google Sheet and return the row number of the first cell matching the passed values.

params.name: Spreadsheet
description: Select Google sheet

params.name: Sheet name
description: Optionally specify a sheet name to search. Sheets are different tabs visible at the bottom of your google doc; enter the name that appears on the tab to specify the sheet. Leaving this blank will use the first sheet in the document.

params.name: Values (comma separated)
description: Enter either a list of any number of values to check for, separated by commas, or data containing a list of values, one in each row.
The row number of the first cell that matches the values will be returned.

params.name: Exact match
description: Check this to match the whole value rather than finding a partial match.

params.name: Columns (optional)
description: Specify a list of column numbers, each separated with a comma. Only the selected columns will be searched.
For example, entering '1,2' here will search in columns 1 and 2 only.

widgetActionList.name: Move a Google Sheet to a new folder in Google Drive
widgetActionList.originalName: Move a Google Sheet to a new folder in Google Drive
widgetActionList.description: Move a Google Sheet to a new folder in Google Drive

params.name: Sheet to move
description: Select Google sheet

params.name: Folder URL
description: Enter the URL of the folder in Google Drive to move this sheet to.

widgetActionList.name: Rollover element
widgetActionList.description: Instruct the bot to record a mouse hover or rollover event, for example on a drop-down menu.

params.name: Select
description: Choose the item you want to hover over.

widgetActionList.name: If condition
widgetActionList.description: If the condition in this step is true, all of its sub-steps will run, otherwise they will be skipped.

widgetActionList.name: End If
widgetActionList.description: End If

widgetActionList.name: Import CSV File
widgetActionList.description: Upload a CSV file from your computer. You can then use the data in other automation steps.

params.name: Import CSV
description: Select CSV file to upload. If you see corrupted characters, please make sure the file is encoded in UTF-8 format.

params.name: First cell
description: Will use A1 if no value provided

params.name: Last cell
description: Will use ZZ if no value provided

widgetActionList.name: How to use this recipe
widgetActionList.description: How to use this recipe

widgetActionList.name: Conditionally jump to another step
widgetActionList.description: Check if some data contains certain values; if it does, jump to a different step.

description: Enter the data to check for values.
params.name: Data to check
Condition to check
description: Check data for either a list of words or if a javascript expression is true.

params.name: Jump to step
description: Enter the number of the step to jump to if the value is found.

params.name: Maximum cycles
description: Maximum number of times this step should trigger in a single run.

params.name: Reverse condition
description: Jump if the specified words are NOT found.

widgetActionList.name: Open a new tab
widgetActionList.description: Opens a new tab in your main browser and navigates to that URL.

params.name: URL
description: Enter the url of the page you wish to open.

widgetActionList.name: Generate random password
widgetActionList.description: Auto generate a password. You can configure the types of characters that are included and the length of the password.

widgetActionList.name: Random Wait
widgetActionList.description: Waits a random amount of time between the specified minimum and maximum.

params.name: Min wait
description: Wait time in miliseconds

params.name: Max wait
description: Wait time in miliseconds

widgetActionList.name: Read data from Airtable
widgetActionList.description: Read data from Airtable

params.name: Base ID
description: Input your airtable base ID

params.name: Table ID or name
description: Input the table ID or name

widgetActionList.name: Read data from Excel
widgetActionList.description: Read data from Excel

params.name: Workbook
description: Select an Excel workbook to read from, or paste its URL here. Reading from workbooks stored on personal OneDrive accounts is not supported

params.name: Sheet name
description: Specify a sheet name to read from. These are the tabs at the bottom of each workbook.

params.name: First cell
description: Will use A1 if no value provided

params.name: Last cell
description: Will use ZZ if no value provided

params.name: Continue when empty
description: If this is turned on, the automation will proceed even if the input sheet is empty.

widgetActionList.name: Read file from Google Drive
widgetActionList.description: Read the contents of a file stored on Google Drive. Supports reading text, pdf and .docx files.

params.name: Google Drive file URL
description: Enter the URL of the file in Google Drive to read.

params.name: Local folder
description: If you are using the desktop version of Axiom you should set a local folder here to use as an intermediate step for the file download. Do not use this setting if you are running Axiom via the cloud.

widgetActionList.name: Read data from a Google Sheet
widgetActionList.originalName: Read data from a Google Sheet
widgetActionList.description: Read rows from a Google Sheet to use as an input data source (use when the user says: from a Google Sheet, read a Google Sheet, for each row).

params.name: Spreadsheet
description: Select Google sheet

params.name: Sheet name
description: Specify a sheet name to read from. These are the tabs at the bottom of each spreadsheet.

params.name: First cell
description: Will use A1 if no value provided

params.name: Last cell
description: Will use ZZ if no value provided

params.name: Continue when empty
description: If this is turned on, the automation will proceed even if the input sheet is empty.

widgetActionList.name: Read local file
widgetActionList.description: Read the contents of a file stored on your computer. Supports reading text, pdf and .docx files.

params.name: File Path
description: Input the path to the file on your computer that should be read.

widgetActionList.name: Trigger webhook
widgetActionList.description: Integrate with any site that supports webhooks by sending them whatever data you want.

params.name: Payload
description: Enter the payload for the request, as JSON.

widgetActionList.name: Restart the browser
widgetActionList.description: Force a browser restart to prevent memory issues in long running bots

params.name: Restart browser
description: Be careful - some javascript or other page state may be lost when reloading the page.

widgetActionList.name: Add row numbers
widgetActionList.description: Add row numbers to a dataset.

description: Select the data to append the row numbers to
params.name: DATA

help.linkText: Learn how to write to the same row in a loop.

params.name: Offset
description: Set an number to start the row numbering at.

widgetActionList.name: Run another Axiom
widgetActionList.description: Run another automation from your account. Once complete, it will return control back to this automation.

params.name: Selected Axiom
description: Select the Axiom to run

widgetActionList.name: Get a list of links to pages from a URL
widgetActionList.originalName: Get a list of links to pages from a URL
widgetActionList.description: Scrape links from a page. Use these to visit those pages and perform further actions - you could get data from those pages, fill in forms on them, and much more.

params.name: URL
description: Enter a URL or multiple URLs, each on their own line. You can also plugin data from other steps to provide URLs.

params.name: Select
description: Choose the links you wish to scrape.

params.name: Find pager
description: Select the 'Next' button for the pager, if there is one. When running the bot, please select 'Use element text' if it stops paging after the first page.

params.name: Max results
description: Set a maximum number of results you wish to scrape. Setting this number higher than the number of results you need will slow down the scraper - axiom has to spend time looking for results that it will never find.

widgetActionList.name: Select random rows
widgetActionList.description: Select random rows from a given data set, and create a new data set containing them.

params.name: Rows
description: Enter the number of rows to select.
Select the data to get rows from.
params.name: DATA

widgetActionList.name: Send an email
widgetActionList.description: Send an email to one or more email addresses.

params.name: Email addresses
description: Enter a list of email addresses to send to, one email address per line.

All emails are sent from a no-reply axiom.ai email address and you will not receive a reply to any message sent. Messages are rate limited to one per 30 seconds. Please do not use this step to send unsolicited email to third parties!

widgetActionList.name: Get data from a URL
widgetActionList.description: Scrape data from any web page.

params.name: URL
description: Enter a URL or multiple URLs, each on their own line. You can also plugin data from other steps to provide URLs.

params.name: Select
description: Choose the data you wish to scrape.

params.name: Find pager
description: Select the 'Next' button for the pager, if there is one. When running the bot, please select 'Use element text' if it stops paging after the first page.

params.name: Max results
description: Set a maximum number of results you wish to scrape. Setting this number higher than the number of results you need will slow down the scraper - axiom has to spend time looking for results that it will never find.

widgetActionList.name: Split by character
widgetActionList.description: Split data into parts using a delimter that you specifiy.

params.name: Character
description: Enter a character or word to split on.
Select the data that should be split.
params.name: DATA

widgetActionList.name: Try
widgetActionList.description: Try

widgetActionList.name: Try / Catch End
widgetActionList.description: Try / Catch End

widgetActionList.name: Receive data from another app
widgetActionList.description: Add this step to use the data passed to Axiom from an external service, such as Zapier or an external API.

params.name: Instructions
description: Step by step guides for:

params.name: API Credentials
description: Click below to copy to clipboard:

params.name: Test data
description: Set up dummy data to test your axiom with. If data is sent via a webhook, any data here will be ignored.
Enter data either by separating columns by commas and rows by line breaks, or in a JSON 2d array format - [["A1", "B1"], ["A2", "B2"]] etc.

widgetActionList.description: Write data to Airtable

params.name: Base ID
description: Input your airtable base ID

params.name: Table ID or name
description: Input the table ID or name
Select the data to write
params.name: DATA
Clear data before writing
description: Add to keep existing data; clear to delete it before adding new data

widgetActionList.description: Write data to an Excel Sheet

params.name: Workbook
description: Select an Excel workbook to write to, or paste its URL here. Writing to workbooks stored on personal OneDrive accounts is not supported.

params.name: Sheet name
description: Specify a sheet name to write to. These are the tabs at the bottom of each workbook.
Select the data to write

widgetActionList.name: Write data to a Google Sheet

params.name: Spreadsheet
description: Select Google sheet

params.name: Sheet name
description: Specify a sheet name to write to. These are the tabs at the bottom of each spreadsheet.
Select the data to write

Write method
description: Select "User Entered" if you want to write formulas to the sheet.
